PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 22, 2013 is admitted to probate. Debra Dolch is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $1,346,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported.
